title: daphne oleoides var. glandulosa
intro: Daphne oleoides var. glandulosa, also known as the pink spurge or pink daphne, is a type of shrub native to the Himalayan region. It is a member of the Thymelaeaceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal compounds. The health benefits of Daphne oleoides var. glandulosa include the treatment of various skin conditions, such as acne, eczema, and wounds, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and fighting infections. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are used in traditional medicine to promote healing and well-being.
